subcommands.description: Build and sign a standalone IPA for the Apple App Store

--help
options.description: Output usage information

name: -c
--clear-credentials
options.description: Clear all credentials stored on Expo servers

options.description: Remove Distribution Certificate stored on Expo servers

name: --clear-push-key
options.description: Remove Push Notifications Key stored on Expo servers

name: --clear-push-cert
options.description: Remove Push Notifications Certificate stored on Expo servers. Use of Push Notifications Certificates is deprecated

name: --clear-provisioning-profile
options.description: Remove Provisioning Profile stored on Expo servers

--revoke-credentials
options.description: Revoke credentials on developer.apple.com, select appropriate using --clear-* options

options.description: Apple ID username (please also set the Apple ID password as EXPO_APPLE_PASSWORD environment variable)

name: -t
--type
options.description: Type of build: [archive|simulator]

name: --release-channel
options.description: Pull from specified release channel

name: --no-publish
options.description: Disable automatic publishing before building

name: --no-wait
options.description: Exit immediately after scheduling build

name: --team-id
options.description: Apple Team ID

name: --dist-p12-path
options.description: Path to your Distribution Certificate P12 (set password as EXPO_IOS_DIST_P12_PASSWORD environment variable)

name: --push-id
options.description: Push Key ID (ex: 123AB4C56D)

name: --push-p8-path
options.description: Path to your Push Key .p8 file

name: --provisioning-profile-path
options.description: Path to your Provisioning Profile

name: --public-url
options.description: The URL of an externally hosted manifest (for self-hosted apps)

name: --skip-credentials-check
options.description: Skip checking credentials

name: --skip-workflow-check
options.description: Skip warning about build service bare workflow limitations

name: --config
options.description: Deprecated: Use app.config.js to switch config files instead
